ques: Compare the prices and flight durations for economy class flights from Oslo to Dubai, departing on July 8, 2026, and show the options with no more than two layovers.
answer: Economy Oslo→Dubai on Jul 8, 2026 (≤2 layovers): cheapest is Pegasus €273 (1 stop, 10h25m); fastest is Emirates nonstop €492 (7h25m). Other options: Pegasus €293/10h45m, SAS+Emirates €606/11h15m, Qatar €630/9h30m, Brussels+Etihad €631/10h45m, Turkish €682/10h10m–11h25m, SAS+Etihad €691/10h25m and €794/8h25m.
